landmark-banner-is-top-level.help: Banner landmark should not be contained in another landmark

og.title: Medicare & Medicaid Service Type Reports
og.description: A set of summary reports that provides Medicare and Medicaid beneficiary use and payment data for various service types—including inpatient hospitals, skilled nursing facilities, hospices, home health agencies, outpatient facilities, physicians, non-physician practitioners, suppliers, and prescription drugs—by yearly trend, demographic characteristic, geography, and other relevant summaries.
og.siteName: Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services Data

checks.label: HTTPS (required for service workers)
checks.why: HTTPS is required for service workers and most install prompts.

checks.label: Web app manifest declared
checks.why: A web app manifest is required for installability and controls how the app appears when launched.

checks.label: Service worker registered
checks.why: A service worker is what makes offline access, caching, and background sync possible.

checks.label: Theme color declared
checks.why: Theme color controls the browser chrome/status-bar color when the site is installed or bookmarked.

checks.label: Apple touch icon (iOS/bookmark icon)
checks.why: iOS uses this icon for home-screen bookmarks and "Add to Home Screen" — without it the icon falls back to a screenshot.

checks.label: Manifest fetched and parsed successfully
checks.why: A manifest that fails to parse cannot drive installability or launch behavior even if the link is present.

checks.label: Manifest declares a maskable icon
checks.why: A maskable icon lets the OS safely crop/mask the app icon on different device shapes without clipping content.

checks.label: Service worker is active (not just registered)
checks.why: An active service worker (not just registered) is what actually intercepts requests and serves cached content.

checks.label: Service worker controls this page load
checks.why: A controlling service worker means THIS page load is being served/intercepted, not just a future one.

checks.label: Meets basic installability criteria
checks.evidence: no readable web app manifest; no service worker registered
checks.why: Determines whether the browser can realistically offer "Add to Home Screen" / install, based on manifest + service worker + HTTPS together.
